creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
the kdenetwork package installs the krn program, which is
	compiled to use gdbm, but gdbm is not listed as a dependency
	in the port.

Fix: 

install the gdbm port/package.
How-To-Repeat: 
	install kdenetwork-1.1.2 package, run ldd on krn.  on my
system it reports:

[root@onceler]# ldd /usr/local/bin/krn
/usr/local/bin/krn:
        libkspell.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libkspell.so.2 (0x280ef000)
        libkhtmlw.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libkhtmlw.so.2 (0x28103000)
        libkimgio.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libkimgio.so.2 (0x28180000)
        libjpeg.so.9 => /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.so.9 (0x28187000)
        libtiff.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/libtiff.so.4 (0x281a3000)
        libz.so.2 => /usr/lib/libz.so.2 (0x281d6000)
        libpng.so.3 => /usr/local/lib/libpng.so.3 (0x281e3000)
        libqt.so.2 => /usr/X11R6/lib/libqt.so.2 (0x281fd000)
        libX11.so.6 => /usr/X11R6/lib/libX11.so.6 (0x28349000)
        libm.so.2 => /usr/lib/libm.so.2 (0x283dc000)
        libjscript.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libjscript.so.2 (0x283f7000)
        libkfile.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libkfile.so.2 (0x28409000)
        libkfm.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libkfm.so.2 (0x28443000)
        libkdecore.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libkdecore.so.2 (0x2844e000)
        libXext.so.6 => /usr/X11R6/lib/libXext.so.6 (0x284af000)
        libkdeui.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libkdeui.so.2 (0x284b9000)
        libmimelib.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libmimelib.so.1 (0x28568000)
        libgdbm.so.2 => not found (0x0)
        libstdc++.so.2 => /usr/lib/libstdc++.so.2 (0x28591000)
        libc.so.3 => /usr/lib/libc.so.3 (0x285c8000)
